build.buildCommand: if [ -f dessert-ai-system/package.json ]; then npm --prefix dessert-ai-system ci; elif [ -f ../package.json ] && [ -f server.js ]; then npm --prefix .. ci; else npm ci; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ -f dessert-ai-system/package.json ]; then npm --prefix dessert-ai-system start; elif [ -f ../package.json ] && [ -f server.js ]; then npm --prefix .. start; else npm start; fi
